facts.statement: The Great Barrier Reef contains 500 individual reefs
The Great Barrier Reef stretches 1,500 km along Australia's coast
The Great Barrier Reef covers an area of 500,000 km²
The Great Barrier Reef is home to 3,000 species of fish
The Great Barrier Reef has 50 species of sharks, rays, and skates
facts.actual: About 125 species of sharks, rays, skates, and chimaeras
